message:
🌱 Add knative: fix using KNative with ArgoCD (don't set `ownerReferences` mission (#1488)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "knative-15483-fix-using-knative-with-argocd-don-t-set-ownerreferences-for-webhoo",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "knative: fix using KNative with ArgoCD (don't set `ownerReferences` for webhooks)",
+    "description": "fix using KNative with ArgoCD (don't set `ownerReferences` for webhooks). Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify knative troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your knative deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative -n knative --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review knative configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant knative configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative\nkubectl get configmap -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative\n```\nIn 2021 KNative made it so that the `ValidatingWebhookConfiguration` and `MutatingWebhookConfiguration` resources were \"owned\" by the Namespace which KNative is installed into (`kanative-serving` by default):\n-"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for fix using KNative with ArgoCD (don't set `ownerReferences`…",
+        "description": "This happened to us today.\n\nHere's the fix:\n\nAdd `WEBHOOK_DISABLE_NAMESPACE_OWNERSHIP` env var to `webhook` container in `knative-serving` namespace.\n\nThen commands ran:\n```\nkubectl delete MutatingWebhookConfiguration   \"webhook.serving.knative.dev\"\nkubectl delete ValidatingWebhookConfiguration\n```yaml\napiVersion: v1\nkind: Pod\nmetadata:\n  name: xxxxxx\n  namespace: xxxxxx\n  ownerReferences:\n    - apiVersion: apps/v1\n      blockOwnerDeletion: true\n      controller: true\n      kind: ReplicaSet\n      name: xxxxxx-759d8cb89\n      uid: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm fix using KNative with ArgoCD (don't set… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative -n knative --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n knative --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This happened to us today.\n\nHere's the fix:\n\nAdd `WEBHOOK_DISABLE_NAMESPACE_OWNERSHIP` env var to `webhook` container in `knative-serving` namespace.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: Pod\nmetadata:\n  name: xxxxxx\n  namespace: xxxxxx\n  ownerReferences:\n    - apiVersion: apps/v1\n      blockOwnerDeletion: true\n      controller: true\n      kind: ReplicaSet\n      name: xxxxxx-759d8cb89\n      uid: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx",
+        "patches:\n  - patch: |-\n      apiVersion: apps/v1\n      kind: Deployment\n      metadata:\n        name: REPLACED_DURING_PATCH\n      spec:\n        template:\n          spec:\n            containers:\n              - name: webhook\n                env:\n                  - name: WEBHOOK_DISABLE_NAMESPACE_OWNERSHIP\n                    value: \"true\"\n    target:\n      group: apps\n      kind: Deployment\n      name: \".*webhook.*\"",
+        "kubectl delete MutatingWebhookConfiguration   \"webhook.serving.knative.dev\"\nkubectl delete ValidatingWebhookConfiguration \"validation.webhook.serving.knative.dev\"\nkubectl delete ValidatingWebhookConfiguration \"config.webhook.serving.knative.dev\"\n\nkubectl delete certificate.networking.internal.knative.dev -n knative-serving         routing-serving-certs\nkubectl delete certificate.networking.internal.knative.dev -n knative-serving-ingress routing-serving-certs"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "knative",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "knative"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Ingress",
+      "Configmap"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/knative/serving/issues/15483",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/knative/serving"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 18,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with knative installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-19T06:26:10.543Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
